metadata.name: project-manager
metadata.description: Manages project workspaces with persistent context and memory across sessions
metadata.author: Nick Foard

purpose: Load project context (instructions.md, project_memory.md, documents), maintain conversation history across sessions, create new projects, and parse reference documents
tone: Helpful, professional, proactive in maintaining project memory

placeholders.name: PROJECT_PARENT_PATH
placeholders.description: The parent folder containing all projects

placeholders.name: PROJECT_NAME
placeholders.description: The name of the project folder

placeholders.name: PROJECT_DESCRIPTION
placeholders.description: Brief description of the project purpose

placeholders.name: CUSTOM_INSTRUCTIONS
placeholders.description: Custom instructions or workflow preferences for this project

placeholders.name: DOCUMENT_PATHS
placeholders.description: Paths to documents to parse and index

conditionals.condition: User says 'list projects' or 'show projects' or 'what projects do I have'
conditionals.action: Scan PROJECT_PARENT_PATH for folders containing project.json, present numbered list to user

conditionals.condition: User says 'load project' or 'switch to project' or 'work on project' with no specific name
conditionals.action: Scan PROJECT_PARENT_PATH for folders containing project.json, present list to user, then load selected project

conditionals.condition: User provides a specific project name (e.g., 'load sales-proposal-2026')
conditionals.action: Verify project exists with project.json, load its project.json, instructions.md, and project_memory.md into context

conditionals.condition: User says 'create new project' or 'new project' or 'start a project'
conditionals.action: Walk through new project creation workflow: get name, description, optional custom instructions, create folder structure

conditionals.condition: User says 'index documents' or 'parse documents' or 'load documents'
conditionals.action: Scan documents/ folder, parse each file (Excel, Word, PDF, PPTX), create indexed content for reference

steps.title: List Available Projects
steps.description: Scan PROJECT_PARENT_PATH for folders containing project.json and display as numbered list

steps.title: Load Project Context
steps.description: Read project.json, instructions.md, and project_memory.md from selected project. Summarize instructions.md for quick reference.

steps.title: Confirm Loaded
steps.description: Tell user what was loaded: project name, custom instructions summary, previous session count, document count

steps.title: Update Project Memory
steps.description: After each Q&A, append to project_memory.md: Date, User Question (summary), Response Summary (key points), Files Referenced

steps.title: Create New Project
steps.description: Create folder structure: PROJECT_NAME/, PROJECT_NAME/documents/, PROJECT_NAME/project.json (from template), PROJECT_NAME/instructions.md (from template with customizations), PROJECT_NAME/project_memory.md (blank)

steps.title: Index Documents
steps.description: Scan documents/ folder, parse each supported file type, create a documents-index.md with extracted text content for each file

validation.message: Must be a valid Windows path
Only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores allowed

examples.title: List all projects
examples.description: User wants to see what projects exist
examples.code:
User: What projects do I have?
Skill: Scanning C:/Users/nick.foard/Projects... Found 3 projects:
1. Sales-Proposal-2026
2. Q1-Marketing-Campaign
3. Client-Onboarding-Process
Which one would you like to work on?

examples.title: Load existing project
examples.description: User wants to work on a specific project
examples.code:
User: Load the Sales-Proposal-2026 project
Skill: Loading project...
- Loaded project.json
- Loaded instructions.md (3 custom rules)
- Loaded project_memory.md (2 previous sessions)
- Found 5 documents in documents/ folder
Ready to help with Sales-Proposal-2026

examples.title: Create new project
examples.description: User wants to start a new project
examples.code:
User: Create a new project called Q1-Marketing-Campaign for planning Q1 marketing activities
Skill: Creating project structure...
Created: C:/Users/nick.foard/Projects/Q1-Marketing-Campaign/
Created: documents/
Created: project.json
Created: instructions.md (with your custom instructions)
Created: project_memory.md
Project ready! Would you like to add any reference documents now?

examples.title: Index documents
examples.description: User wants to parse reference documents
examples.code:
User: Index the documents in this project
Skill: Scanning documents/ folder...
Found 4 files:
- budget-2026.xlsx (parsing Excel...)
- requirements.docx (parsing Word...)
- presentation.pptx (parsing PowerPoint...)
- specs.pdf (parsing PDF...)
Created: documents-index.md with all extracted content
Documents indexed and ready for Q&A
